title: cyathea alsophilum
intro: Cyathea alsophilum, also known as the Alsophila fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cyathea alsophilum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Cyathea alsophilum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
